lessons.title: Character Creation
lessons.objective: Design your adventurer and confirm your appearance to enter Eldermoor.

steps.detail: Warden Halric greets you and opens the appearance designer.
Cycle head, torso, arms, hands, legs, feet and colour options.
Choose pronouns and body type, then press Confirm.

lessons.title: Controls & Settings
lessons.objective: Talk to Warden Halric and learn movement, camera and the interface tabs.

steps.detail: Warden Halric explains click-to-move and the RS-style camera.
Open the Settings tab as instructed.
Halric points you to the door leading outside to the Survival Expert.

lessons.title: Woodcutting
lessons.objective: Get an axe from Forester Maeve and chop a tree for logs.

steps.detail: Forester Maeve explains gathering and hands you a bronze axe.
The bronze axe goes to your inventory; she explains the inventory tab.
Click a tree to chop it until you receive logs.

lessons.title: Firemaking
lessons.objective: Use a tinderbox on your logs to light a fire.

steps.detail: Forester Maeve gives you a tinderbox.
Use the tinderbox on the logs in your inventory.
A fire ignites on the ground; keep it for cooking next.

lessons.title: Fishing
lessons.objective: Take a fishing net and catch raw shrimp at the pond.

steps.detail: Forester Maeve gives you a small fishing net.
Click the fishing spot in the pond to net raw shrimp.

lessons.title: Cooking on a Fire
lessons.objective: Cook your raw shrimp on the fire, then continue through the gate.

steps.detail: Use the raw shrimp on the fire you lit.
Cook the shrimp; a burnt one teaches that food can fail.
Forester Maeve sends you on toward Cook Tobin's house.

lessons.title: Master Chef's Bread
lessons.objective: Use the pot of flour on the bucket of water to make dough, then bake it into bread on the range.

steps.detail: Cook Tobin welcomes you and gives flour and water.
Use the pot of flour on the bucket of water to form dough.
Use the dough on the range to bake a loaf of bread.

lessons.title: Quests & the Journal
lessons.objective: Talk to Loremaster Edda about the quest journal, then head to the mine ladder.

steps.detail: Loremaster Edda explains quests and the journal.
Open the Quests tab to view your quest list.
Edda directs you to the ladder down into the mine.

lessons.title: Mining
lessons.objective: Take a pickaxe and mine tin and copper ore.

steps.detail: Pickmaster Doran hands you a bronze pickaxe.
Mine the tin ore rock for tin ore.
Mine the copper ore rock for copper ore.

lessons.title: Smelting
lessons.objective: Smelt your tin and copper ore into a bronze bar at the furnace.

steps.detail: Pickmaster Doran explains the furnace.
Use the ore on the furnace.
Smelt tin + copper into a bronze bar.

lessons.title: Smithing
lessons.objective: Use your bronze bar and hammer on the anvil to smith a bronze dagger, then climb out.

steps.detail: Pickmaster Doran gives you a hammer.
Use the bronze bar on the anvil.
Smith the bar into a bronze dagger.
Climb the ladder up out of the mine.

lessons.title: Equipment & Melee
lessons.objective: Wield your dagger, equip leather armour, and kill a rat in the pen.

steps.detail: Sergeant Vael explains the Equipment tab.
Wield the bronze dagger and equip leather body and gloves.
Open the Equipment tab to confirm your worn gear.
Attack a giant rat in the pen until it dies.

lessons.title: Ranged Combat
lessons.objective: Equip a shortbow and arrows and kill a rat at range.

steps.detail: Sergeant Vael gives you a shortbow and bronze arrows.
Wield the shortbow and equip the bronze arrows.
Open the Combat tab and review attack styles.
Shoot a giant rat at range until it dies.

lessons.title: Banking
lessons.objective: Open the bank with Teller Wynn and learn to deposit and withdraw.

steps.detail: Teller Wynn explains the bank.
Open the bank booth interface.
Deposit an item, then withdraw it to learn the controls.

lessons.title: Account & Poll
lessons.objective: Talk to Steward Brann about account management and the poll booth.

steps.detail: Steward Brann explains account security and management.
Open the Account Management tab.
Inspect the poll booth (Eldermoor's civic voting station).

lessons.title: Prayer & Social
lessons.objective: Bury bones at the altar for Prayer XP and learn the Friends tabs.

steps.detail: Brother Aldric explains Prayer and the altar.
Open the Prayer tab to view your prayers.
Bury the bones at the altar for Prayer experience.
Aldric explains the Friends and Ignore lists.

lessons.title: Magic
lessons.objective: Receive runes and cast Wind Strike on the practice chicken.

steps.detail: Magus Sorrel gives you air runes and mind runes.
Open the Magic tab and find Wind Strike.
Cast Wind Strike on the practice chicken.

lessons.title: Departure
lessons.objective: Talk to Warden Halric, confirm departure, and sail to the mainland.

steps.detail: Warden Halric confirms you are ready to leave the island.
Confirm the leave-island prompt.
Board the departure boat and sail to Eldermoor's mainland.
